package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
	"time"
)

// scenario for log_level_check_after_format: `zap.S().Debugf("expensive %v", computeDebug())` or `logrus.Debugf("data: %v", expensiveCall())` where the expensive computation happens regardless of log level
// fixture polarity: negative; family: library; severity: info.
type Rule415NegativeRecord struct {
	client *http.Client
}

func scenario415Negative(ctx context.Context, holder Rule415NegativeRecord, url string) (*http.Response, error) {
	client := holder.client
	if client == nil {
		client = &http.Client{Timeout: 2 * time.Second}
	}
	req, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, http.MethodGet, url, nil)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	return client.Do(req)
}
